name: locker.zone_manager_save_probe_mcw
description: Package 1 proof scenario for the McWilliams CAMP_LOCKER create flow: name at creation time, single-Esc save prompt closeout, and post-return persistence recheck.

steps.label: wait_for_gameplay_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: McWilliams gameplay is loaded on the normal map before Zone Manager input; this is startup/load footing only.

steps.label: open_zones_manager
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager UI is open; same-run UI trace must show the existing Basecamp: Locker row with type CAMP_LOCKER.

steps.label: add_zone
steps.expected_visible_fact: The Zone Manager add-zone/type picker flow is open before selecting a zone type.

steps.label: choose_camp_locker_zone_type
steps.expected_visible_fact: The Camp Locker zone type selection is submitted and the name/placement flow is reached.

steps.label: creation_name_prompt_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: The new-zone name prompt is settled before replacing the default name with Probe Locker.

steps.label: clear_creation_zone_name
steps.expected_visible_fact: The new-zone name field is cleared before typing the probe name.

steps.label: type_creation_zone_name
steps.expected_visible_fact: The Probe Locker name is submitted and zone-corner placement begins.

steps.label: pick_zone_start
steps.expected_visible_fact: The first zone corner is accepted through the real placement UI.

steps.label: pick_zone_end
steps.expected_visible_fact: The second zone corner is accepted; same-run UI trace must show a new Probe Locker CAMP_LOCKER row.

steps.label: post_creation_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager remains stable after creating the Probe Locker CAMP_LOCKER zone.

steps.label: open_save_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: The Zone Manager save-changes prompt is opened after creating the Probe Locker zone.

steps.label: confirm_save_changes
steps.expected_visible_fact: The save-changes confirmation is accepted, returning toward normal gameplay before saved-zone metadata is audited.

steps.label: post_save_gameplay_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: Gameplay is stable after saving the Zone Manager change.

steps.label: audit_saved_existing_locker_zone_after_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved zone metadata still contains the persistent Basecamp: Locker zone with type CAMP_LOCKER after the Zone Manager save confirmation; the newly created Probe Locker row is credited from UI trace/reopen, not disk-file audit
steps.abort_reason: saved Basecamp: Locker CAMP_LOCKER zone metadata missing after Zone Manager save

steps.label: reopen_zones_manager_for_persistence_check
steps.expected_visible_fact: Reopened Zone Manager shows persisted CAMP_LOCKER rows, including the same-run Probe Locker row in UI trace.
